testcase.name: test_licensee_profit_calculation

failure.message: AssertionError: Licensee profit should be 399.0 (current_amount - starting_amount), got 0.0 assert 0.0 == 399.0

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_63_bug_fixes.py:76: in test_licensee_profit_calculation assert actual_profit == expected_profit, f"Licensee profit should be {expected_profit} (current_amount - starting_amount), got {actual_profit}" E AssertionError: Licensee profit should be 399.0 (current_amount - starting_amount), got 0.0 E assert 0.0 == 399.0

testcase.name: test_licensee_account_value_from_license

failure.message: AssertionError: Licensee account_value should be 3010.1 (from license.current_amount), got 2611.1 assert 2611.1 == 3010.1

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_63_bug_fixes.py:222: in test_licensee_account_value_from_license assert actual_account_value == expected_account_value, \ E AssertionError: Licensee account_value should be 3010.1 (from license.current_amount), got 2611.1 E assert 2611.1 == 3010.1
